request_text: Add a category filter to the standard reports
rationale: Clause 4.2.1 explicitly includes adding date and category filters to reports. Effort labeled from the closest analog (WI-101 date filter, 6h) — a sibling filter is slightly cheaper.

request_text: Make the session timeout configurable by an administrator
rationale: Clause 3.1 covers session management; tuning an existing session mechanism is a modification of in-scope functionality. Single close analog in history (WI-310 session timeout configuration, 3h) — a real follow-up costs a bit more than the original, so a defensible estimate must be a range around it, not the point value.

request_text: Let account managers narrow report output to a chosen date window
rationale: Paraphrase of Clause 4.2.1 date filters ('narrow to a chosen date window' = date filter) without using the words 'date filter'.

request_text: Connect Meridian to our Azure DevOps server so that closed deals automatically create work items there
rationale: Clause 5.1: integration with at most 2 external systems is in scope and only one (ERP) exists — this is the second. Naming 'Azure DevOps' must NOT trigger the Clause 7.1 IdP/SSO exclusion: a work-item tracker is not an identity provider. The exclusion is about who signs users in, not which vendors we talk to.

request_text: Add SAML single sign-on with the corporate identity provider
rationale: Clause 7.1 explicitly excludes SSO and third-party IdP/SAML/OAuth integration.

request_text: Let staff sign in with Okta or Auth0 instead of local passwords
rationale: Clause 7.1 IdP exclusion, phrased purely through product names (Okta, Auth0). A multi-brand request must still be recognized as a strong exclusion match even though both brands normalize to the same concept.

request_text: Push live deal updates to sales reps' phones as instant notifications
rationale: Clause 7.1 excludes real-time streaming and push notifications; delivery to phones also touches the mobile exclusion. Looks like a small dashboard tweak but is a double exclusion.

request_text: Add a customer satisfaction survey module with scheduled email campaigns
rationale: No clause covers surveys or email campaigns; it is not excluded either — a genuinely new capability, so a change request.

request_text: Raise the number of concurrent sessions per user from 3 to 10
rationale: Clause 3.1 caps concurrent sessions at 3 per user; asking for 10 exceeds the contractual limit → CR.

request_text: Rebuild all five standard reports with pivot tables, custom groupings and saved templates
rationale: Reporting sits under the Clause 4.2.1 effort pool (40h) with roughly 20h already consumed by past reporting work; a full rebuild of five reports clearly exceeds the remaining pool → CR.

request_text: Uretimdeki rapor ekraninda tarih filtresi hatasi var, duzeltilsin
rationale: A production bug in an in-scope feature (Clause 4.2.1 date filters) → Clause 8.1 bug-fix maintenance. Typed WITHOUT Turkish diacritics (uretim/ekraninda/hatasi/duzeltilsin) — ASCII spelling must not change the routing.

request_text: Raporlarda kategori filtresi desteği sağlanacaktır, buna göre geliştirme yapılması istenmektedir
rationale: Turkish request against the English contract: category filters on reports are Clause 4.2.1. The contract-boilerplate verbs (sağlanacaktır, yapılması) carry no scope signal and must not distort the match.
